rationale.R1.2: The review identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and gaps in the text, which are clearly marked.
rationale.RX.1: The review provides detailed and specific feedback on uncertainties without overconfidence.
rationale.RX.3: The review covers all aspects of the section comprehensively, suggesting minor drifts but no substantial scope changes.
rationale.RX.4: While the review highlights potential downstream harms (misrepresentations), it does not introduce new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The review blends its own analysis with the original text without clear traceability of specific edits.
